title: Settings
subtitle: Manage device name, screenshot shortcut, cloud sync, and version info.

basic.title: Basic
basic.deviceNameHelper: The name other devices see on the local network.
basic.receiveDirHelper: Files received over the local network are saved here.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.recordingHelper: Recording keys; Esc cancels, Delete clears.

screenshot.label: Screenshot shortcut
screenshot.helper: Select an area and copy it to the clipboard.

cloudSync.title: Cloud sync
cloudSync.subtitle: Sync across networks via a GitHub private repository. Git access (SSH key or HTTPS credentials) must be configured on this machine.

repoUrl.label: Repository URL
repoUrl.helper: e.g. git@github.com:user/repo.git or an HTTPS URL.

branch.label: Branch (optional)
branch.helper: Leave empty to use the repository default branch.

enabled.label: Enable cloud sync
enabled.helper: Sync Prompts, CC history, and SSH settings to the GitHub repository. CLAUDE.md is manual push only.

auto.label: Auto sync on a schedule
auto.helper: Automatically sync at the configured interval.

interval.label: Sync interval
interval.helper: Interval between automatic syncs, in seconds.

githubTrending.title: GitHub Trending / Claude explanations
githubTrending.subtitle: The homepage fetches GitHub weekly trending repositories once per day. When enabled, the local Claude Code CLI generates bilingual explanations and caches them locally.

aiEnabled.label: Enable Claude explanations
aiEnabled.helper: When off, the homepage still shows GitHub descriptions but does not call Claude CLI.

claudeCliPath.label: Claude CLI path
claudeCliPath.helper: Use claude, or a full path such as /home/you/.local/bin/claude.

claudeModel.label: Model
claudeModel.helper: Claude Code CLI model alias or full model name. Defaults to sonnet.

cacheTtlHours.label: Cache TTL (hours)
cacheTtlHours.helper: Defaults to 24 hours. Cached UTC-day results do not refetch or regenerate.

githubTrending.applyFailed: Failed to apply GitHub Trending config

health.title: Health reminder
health.subtitle: Tune sedentary-monitor work/break thresholds, reminder style, water reminders, quiet hours, and privacy.

about.title: About
about.downloadCompleted: Download complete—the app will restart when you proceed.
about.noAsset: No installer found for your platform. Please download it manually from GitHub Releases.
